summary: Tutorial walkthrough + full team/run lifecycle pass on dev-01e85e9; the two prior stray-positional fails are fixed. One new fail: `clier run stop --help` claims idempotency but a second stop on an already-stopped run returns error 1.

Tutorial walkthrough (Phase 1 + Phase 2) and full team/run lifecycle pass; 3 fail findings — `clier version` and `clier team list` silently swallow stray positional args, and the tutorial omits unstar/reset-protocol/delete/failure-path coverage.
